## Summary

- What changed?
- Why this change?

## Type

- [ ] UI (`feat/ui-*`)
- [ ] API (`feat/api-*`)
- [ ] Fix (`fix/*`)
- [ ] Docs/Chore

## Testing

- [ ] `npm run lint`
- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] Manual preview checked (desktop + mobile)

## Screenshots / Preview URL

- Vercel Preview:
- Screenshots:

## Risk Check

- [ ] No production secrets hardcoded
- [ ] No live Stripe/Runpod calls accidentally enabled in preview
